# applied to ALL profiles by brave-theme (Brave must be CLOSED). GENERATED by
# brave-sync from the 'Default' profile — only curated allowlisted keys, never
# bookmarks/passwords/history/site-exceptions. Edit values freely; # comments ok.

brave.ai_chat.autocomplete_provider_enabled = false

brave.new_tab_page.shows_options = 1
bookmark_bar.show_on_all_tabs = true
brave.always_show_bookmark_bar_on_ntp = false
brave.location_bar_is_wide = true
browser.theme.color_scheme2 = 0
credentials_enable_service = false
credentials_enable_autosignin = false
search.suggest_enabled = false
brave.shields.advanced_view_enabled = true
